arts.ttl: Arne Slot admits Liverpool CANNOT play 'fantastic football' every week amid recent wobble - as Reds look to go 10 points clear at the top
arts.sum: JOE BERNSTEIN: Slot's Premier League leaders could move 10 points clear with a win at Villa Park but have been unconvincing in their last three games.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery tells Marcus Rashford how he can become Aston Villa's Mo Salah
arts.sum: Aston Villa’s boss was gushing with praise for the Mo Salah, who he says is ‘unique’ as he prepared for a test he says is the most difficult his club will face during the run-in

arts.ttl: Arne Slot admits Liverpool are just two games from home straight of Arsenal title race
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Aston Villa on Wednesday night before a trip to Manchester City on Sunday in what could be a huge few days in their bid for a 20th English league title

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes Man City comparison as he responds to recent Liverpool displays
arts.sum: Liverpool face Aston Villa on Wednesday night after two below-par performances against Everton and Wolves but head coach Arne Slot is not concerned about form

arts.ttl: Unai Emery provides Marcus Rashford and Marco Asensio update - as he makes Mohamed Salah comparison ahead of Liverpool clash
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: Villa's on-loan pair have produced impressive cameos in their two substitute outings and Emery expects them to be ready to play from the off in the coming weeks.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa fast-track Marcus Rashford and Marco Asensio plan as Liverpool decision looms
arts.sum: Asked if Rashford and Asensio are close to starting, Emery said: “Yes, because they are in their individual process to get fit and understand our idea tactically. Unai Emery is considering handing Marcus Rashford and Marco Asensio their first starts for Aston Villa against Premier League leaders Liverpool on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Papers: Diaz desperate for Salah to extend Liverpool contract
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Wednesday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Arsenal and Aston Villa's Champions League path clearer with play-off results
arts.sum: Arsenal, Aston Villa and Liverpool are all safely through to the Last 16 stage of the Champions League and they are now closer to learning who they will face next

arts.ttl: Liverpool predicted lineup vs Aston Villa - Premier League
arts.sum: Predicted Liverpool starting lineup for their upcoming Premier League clash at Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool closely monitoring situation as Barcelona now ‘open’ to letting star exit
arts.sum: Frenkie de Jong’s future at Barcelona is hanging in the balance – and Liverpool are closely monitoring the situation ahead of a potential summer move. The Dutch midfielder could be on the move, but he would have to take a pay cut.
